name: aberdeen-1996-digital-debunks-ntsmp-scalability-myth
title: Digital Debunks the NT/SMP Scalability Myth
description: Aberdeen Group Market Viewpoint (November 1996) using TPC-C benchmark data to argue that 4-way NT servers outperform Unix midrange at lower cost, debunking NT SMP scalability concerns. Analyzes Microsoft's clustering strategy and Digital's market position.
